title: The purpose of the MPEs suicide and those green crosses
display_title: The purpose of the MPEs suicide and those green crosses
wikitext:
[]: The purpose of the MPEs suicide and those green crosses             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 16, 2006 8:40 pm I've always been somewhat confused by these factors, especially the MPEs killing themselves while making sex sounds, what exactly is the purpose of this? Instrumentality has already been started before they go "Lol let's kill ourselves", people on the Geofront and Earth (seeing how SEELE go sploosh) are already being turned into delicious tang and everyone's AT Field seems to have already been nullified. I have always assumed the MPEs killing themselves had something to do with the fancy CG crosses that appear all over the surface of Earth as souls are being launched upwards for GNR to collect (if you look close it seems like the it's the crosses that are actually launching the souls upwards), perhaps they had to impale themselves in order to use EVANGELION MAGIC and make the crosses appear? I have no idea, really.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 16, 2006 9:16 pm Well, how else are the souls within their cores going to be released to be reunited with the rest of humanity?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 16, 2006 9:22 pm Do the Mass Production Eva Units even have souls? The soul inside an Eva is principally to help the pilot synch with the unit (OR AT LEAST THE CI SAYS SO), but the MPEs run on Kaworu-based Dummy Plugs, and the Dummy Plug System, if I recall correctly, generates an artificial soul, or at least I remember Reichu saying so once and she knows about Eva way more than me. Also, the MPEs just stabbed themselves in the core, doesn't the soul remain in someone's body when they die? we see the Rei-tachi tangifying random dead people, Ritsuko, and Misato despite the fact they've been dead for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 16, 2006 9:39 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Do the Mass Production Eva Units even have souls? The soul inside an Eva is principally to help the pilot synch with the unit (OR AT LEAST THE CI SAYS SO), but the MPEs run on Kaworu-based Dummy Plugs, and the Dummy Plug System, if I recall correctly, generates an artificial soul, or at least I remember Reichu saying so once and she knows about Eva way more than me.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Dec 16, 2006 9:40 pm ATF=soul The dummy system is one of those things in the CI that makes you scratch your head. C. Confidential Information A copy of a personality is made in the Dummy Plug, but a soul cannot be copied. Why can't it be done, or how would it be done? As far as the technology branches of Seele and Nerv are concerned, it is a theme of research integral to seeking out the Path to God, and study into how to deal with the problem has spanned many years. Examples of failure include Yui and Asuka's mother. The Dummy Plug is something that came about in the midst of that research. D. In-Depth Information The Dummy System is an artificial soul that was developed at the end of the research. In terms of functionality, however, the Dummy System was severely subpar: Although it could make Eva activate, that was the limit of its capacity.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 16, 2006 9:43 pm Ornette wrote: What else could possibly be happening here?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 17, 2006 12:08 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Also, the MPEs just stabbed themselves in the core, doesn't the soul remain in someone's body when they die? we see the Rei-tachi tangifying random dead people, Ritsuko, and Misato despite the fact they've been dead for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 17, 2006 12:53 pm Reichu wrote: MaggotMaster wrote: I have always assumed the MPEs killing themselves had something to do with the fancy CG crosses that appear all over the surface of Earth as souls are being launched upwards for GNR to collect (if you look close it seems like the it's the crosses that are actually launching the souls upwards), perhaps they had to impale themselves in order to use EVANGELION MAGIC and make the crosses appear?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 17, 2006 9:21 pm I pretty much thought the green crosses were the souls of humanity/former living things, though I guess they were being transported into GNR's body/into the LCL Sea? I don't have a screen cap of it, but her vagina-palms have red things (again, the souls, just LCL-form??) entering her. With what the MPE's are doing, besides apparently getting off? (Naughty harpies! They must have used a time-pardox to "corrupt" Shinji before EoE began. ) Insert's Reichu's "Anno-sensei: Go fanwank something" pic here.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Dec 18, 2006 12:00 am Ornette wrote: They "trick" the soul inside the Eva into thinking there's a pilot. The Evas can't function at all without a soul in the core.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 18, 2006 12:23 am

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Dec 18, 2006 2:27 am Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 18, 2006 2:43 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I pretty much thought the green crosses were the souls of humanity/former living things, though I guess they were being transported into GNR's body/into the LCL Sea? I don't have a screen cap of it, but her vagina-palms have red things (again, the souls, just LCL-form??) entering her.

[]:             Quote Post by jakewashere » Mon Dec 18, 2006 5:29 pm "Drip" this and "orgasm" that - I guess AWL didn't provide enough Freudianisms to make sense of it all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 18, 2006 7:56 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Dec 18, 2006 8:42 pm Personally I don't like "dream world" as a discription since it implies that what we see isn't real "metaphysical reality" sounds much better.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 18, 2006 8:52 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Personally I don't like "dream world" as a discription since it implies that what we see isn't real "metaphysical reality" sounds much better.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:46 am Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Dec 19, 2006 5:53 am cat42 wrote: Bu-bu-but, the CI... ARGH!!! CURSE YOU YOU ANNO!!!

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Dec 19, 2006 6:08 am I know, I know, but Anno said... But then again, the information is second tier... But maybe it's not Rei I's soul, but an impression of Rei I?
